news.headline: BMO and 1871 are seeking applications for 6th WMNfintech Program in Chicago. Deadline: April 10, 2025. empowers startup founders.
news.summary: Until April 10, 2025, interested individuals can submit their applications for the WMNfintech program in Chicago. The program is a collaboration between BMO and 1871, aiming to support startup founders in developing and expanding innovative services related to finance and technology.

news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $255.3 mln.
Novartis becomes the first corporate pharm partner of NFL, aiming to boost fans' health commitment. Covers Crucial Catch and Health and Safety Summit.
news.summary: A new exclusive pharmaceutical agreement has been established for the long term, aiming to translate fans' love for the game into a dedication to improved health. Novartis has partnered with the NFL, covering key health programs such as Crucial Catch and the yearly Health and Safety Summit EAST. This partnership seeks to leverage the NFL's wide-reaching platform to promote health initiatives and values.

news.headline: SeaWorld Orlando announces "Expedition Odyssey" Arctic adventure for 2025 with innovative tech, real-world footage, wildlife encounters.
news.summary: SeaWorld Orlando recently unveiled a groundbreaking Arctic expedition, offering an unparalleled ride technology that immerses visitors in stunning real-world footage and up-close encounters with Arctic wildlife. This experience, hailed as the most immersive Arctic adventure ever crafted, is set to revolutionize theme park experiences. The announcement was made on March 13, 2025, in Orlando, Florida. For media assets related to this exciting unveiling, interested parties can download them directly from the provided link.

news.headline: Brazil Steelmaker CSN sees room for the government to negotiate with the US on tariffs over next two months, with the possibility of a quotas agreement - Executive.
Success of strategies from 2010s validated as they continue to yield positive results.

Village Farms CEO mentions profitable expansion, reports 11% rise in Q4 sales to $82.55M, despite $10.5M inventory write-down. Adjusted EBITDA loss was $3.5M, excluding write-down EBITDA would have been $7M.
news.summary: During the fourth quarter, Village Farms International, Inc (NASDAQ:VFF) posted impressive sales of $82.55 million, indicating an 11% year-over-year increase, surpassing the anticipated $79.87 million. However, the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 were impacted by a $10.5 million non-cash impairment charge associated with non-flower inventory in Canadian Cannabis. This decision was made by management after determining that the inventory did not meet the company's quality standards. The consolidated adjusted EBITDA loss stood at $3.5 million, a notable increase from $700,000 in the previous year. Excluding the inventory write-down in Canadian Cannabis, adjusted EBITDA would have been $7 million. This recent data provides key insights into the company's financial performance and highlights areas for improvement.

news.headline: CUPE's Airline Division opposes Liberal plan to privatize Canadian airports; represents 18,500 flight attendants.
news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, CUPE's Airline Division is opposing the Liberal government's plan to privatize Canadian airports. The division represents 18,500 flight attendants nationwide. President Wesley Lesosky stated that airport privatization could endanger union jobs and escalate expenses for travelers, especially amidst challenges posed by President Trump's actions against Canada. CUPE firmly stands against this proposal to protect jobs and services.

news.headline: Baker Hughes to power data centers with NovaLT gas turbines due to increasing AI demand; contract to supply equipment for projects across North America.
news.summary: Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) was awarded a contract by TURBINE-X Energy Inc. to provide its NovaLT gas turbine technology. The NovaLT gas turbine can run on various fuels, including natural gas, hydrogen blends, and pure hydrogen. Under the agreement, Baker Hughes is set to supply equipment like gears and power generation generator technology for multiple data center projects across North America. The deal signifies a significant partnership in the energy sector. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Palantir partners with Databricks to merge AI platforms for autonomous workflows, enabling secure access to GenAI & ML.
news.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) announced a significant partnership on Thursday with Databricks to merge Palantir’s AI operating system with Databricks’ platform for AI, data warehousing, and data engineering. The collaboration will bring together the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform and Palantir Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) to create real-time, AI-powered autonomous workflows. Through the combination of Unity Catalog, Delta Sharing, and Palantir’s security features, customers will have secure, unified access to GenAI, machine learning, and data warehousing. This integration will provide a scalable and open data architecture, merging Palantir's Ontology System with Databricks’ processing capabilities.

news.headline: NVIDIA & Microsoft team up to introduce neural shading support in DirectX, improving frame rates, image quality, and reducing resource consumption for developers. NVDA shares trading higher.
news.summary: Shares of NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) are seeing an increase in trading on Thursday as the company announced a partnership with Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) to unveil neural shading support in the Microsoft DirectX preview for April. Neural shading, a pioneering development in graphics programming that combines AI with traditional rendering methods, is expected to have a major impact. This innovation aims to boost frame rates, improve image quality, and decrease system resource usage. The collaboration will give developers the opportunity to utilize the AI Tensor capabilities of NVIDIA GeForce RTX GPUs. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SPX FLOW celebrates Pi Day with 3.14 reasons, combining engineering with baking innovations.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025 in Charlotte, North Carolina, SPX FLOW, a leader in process solutions, is commemorating Pi Day with 3.14 reasons for celebration. The company integrates expert engineering into their innovations that contribute to the production of delightful food creations. SPX FLOW's technologies play a crucial role in developing smooth fillings and flaky crusts, showcasing a seamless blend of engineering excellence and culinary artistry.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating $75,000+ losses in Block. Investors urged to contact for options.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors with losses surpassing $75,000 in Block during the period of February 26, 2020, to April 30, 2024, to reach out to him directly. If you fall into this category, it is advised to discuss your available options with him.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Crocs investors. Contact James Wilson if you suffered losses between Nov 3, 2022, and Oct 28, 2024.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Crocs to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Crocs during the period of November 3, 2022, to October 28, 2024, and want to explore your options, contact him directly.

news.headline: Kearney and Purdue University collaborate to boost agribusiness education, aiming to bridge academia-industry gap.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Kearney's agriculture and food team announced a collaboration with Purdue University's Center for Food and Agricultural Business in Chicago. The partnership aims to strengthen connections between academia and industry to improve the sector. This initiative will bring together experts from both organizations, leveraging their knowledge and resources. The partnership seeks to address key challenges in the agriculture and food industry and drive innovation. This collaboration demonstrates a commitment to advancing research and development in the field.

news.headline: Edgecore Americas Networking Corporation receives GSA Schedule, making its Open Infrastructure Solutions accessible to Federal Government agencies.
news.summary: Edgecore Americas Networking Corporation, headquartered in Irvine, California, has been awarded the GSA Schedule. This achievement will facilitate Federal Government access to the company's Open Infrastructure Solutions. With this contract in place, federal agencies can now easily procure Edgecore's products and services. This move is expected to enhance the company's reach and impact in the government sector, driving growth and potentially increasing revenue.

news.headline: ClickHouse buys HyperDX to enhance observability solutions. Fastest analytical database company. Acquisition supports speed, scalability.
news.summary: In San Francisco, ClickHouse, known for having the world's quickest analytical database, revealed the acquisition of HyperDX, an open-source observability platform developed on ClickHouse. This strategic move underlines ClickHouse's dedication to providing rapid, efficient, and scalable solutions to developers and businesses globally, including in observability. The acquisition merges ClickHouse's unparalleled performance and scalability with HyperDX's capabilities.

news.headline: Textron Aviation offers high-speed internet for Cessna Citation X and X+ jets, benefiting customers.
news.summary: Textron Aviation introduced a new high-speed internet connectivity option for the Cessna Citation X and X+, based in Wichita, Kansas.

news.headline: ETH's 20% drop may trigger $336M DeFi liquidations; prices to watch $1,857 and $1,780. Calls for RWAs integration to offset volatility.
news.summary: If the price of Ether (ETH) drops a further 20%, it could trigger up to $336 million in DeFi liquidations, with $136 million and $117 million already at risk at price levels of $1,857 and $1,780 respectively. Founder Kevin Rusher of the RWA lending platform RAAC warns that a 20% drop to $1,500 could cause total liquidations of $336 million. The crisis is attributed to a $130 million ETH-backed loan in Sky (formerly Maker). ETH has declined over 15% in the past week, below the 200-day EMA since February, with the RSI at 31, nearing oversold territory. Experts suggest shifting to higher-performing altcoins amid ETH's weak performance. Total ETH liquidations could reach $336 million if prices continue to drop, with significant risk levels identified at $1,857 and $1,780. The current ETH price has fallen by over 15% in the past week, trading below the 200-day EMA and reaching an RSI of 31, close to oversold territory. The potential $1,500 price level poses the highest risk for DeFi liquidations. The article emphasizes the need for a more stable asset integration in DeFi to mitigate volatility.

news.headline: Patronus AI introduces Multimodal LLM-as-a-Judge for image evaluation, helping Etsy reduce AI hallucinations.
news.summary: In San Francisco on March 13, 2025, the e-commerce company Etsy is utilizing technology to minimize AI hallucinations in product image descriptions. Patronus AI recently introduced the Multimodal LLM-as-a-Judge (MLLM-as-a-Judge), which is considered the first of its kind in the industry. This new technology aims to address and mitigate inaccuracies in AI-generated content.

news.headline: Investors of Newmont urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if suffered losses; purchased securities between Feb 22, 2024 and Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Newmont to reach out to him directly for a discussion on their potential options. If you bought or obtained Newmont securities within the period from February 22, 2024, to October 23, 2024, and are interested in exploring further, please contact James (Josh) Wilson for counsel.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Pliant Therapeutics investors. Contact James Wilson for options.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is reaching out to investors who have experienced substantial losses in Pliant Therapeutics. If you have suffered significant financial setbacks due to investments in Pliant Therapeutics stock or options, Wilson urges you to get in touch with him to explore potential courses of action.

news.headline: Loto-Québec posts strong results in third quarter of fiscal year 2024-2025, with revenues at $734.4M (+5.1%) and net income at $360.5M (+6.3%). Total revenues from April 1 to December 30, 2024, were $2.238B (+6.0%), with net income at $1.132B (+5.2%). $1.073B in prizes awarded to lottery winners.
news.summary: Loto-Québec had a strong third-quarter performance in the 2024-2025 fiscal year, showing growth compared to the previous year. In the quarter from October 1 to December 30, 2024, total revenues were $734.4 million, up $35.5 million (5.1%), with a net income of $360.5 million, an increase of $21.3 million (6.3%). From April 1 to December 30, 2024, total revenues were $2.238 billion, up $127.0 million (6.0%), and net income reached $1.132 billion, up $55.8 million (5.2%). Lottery winners received $1.073 billion in prizes during the fiscal year. The President and CEO credited the organization's committed teams and efficient management for the positive results.

news.headline: XRP price jumps 7.2% to $2.32 in 24 hours, all-time high at $3.40. Weeklong loss of 11.0% from $2.59 to $2.32.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) surged by 7.2% to reach $2.32, marking a positive turn from the previous week's downtrend that saw an 11.0% decline from $2.59. Currently, the coin's all-time high remains at $3.40. This price movement and volatility can be visually compared through a chart. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cardano drops 32% after not being included in Bitcoin-only reserve, following 58% surge from Trump's announcement.
news.summary: In the last week, Cardano (CRYPTO: ADA) saw a significant 23% decrease following a strategic decision to exclude it from a crypto reserve. The price of Cardano had surged by 58% after President Trump's announcement on March 2 that it would be included in the reserve. However, in a subsequent move, Trump signed an executive order establishing a Bitcoin-only reserve and placing altcoins like ADA into a non-buying stockpile intended solely for holding and selling purposes. Consequently, Cardano's gains were entirely reversed, dropping from $1.14. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US imposes sanctions on Iran’s Oil Minister and shadow fleet, escalating tensions further. #sanctions #Iran #US
Surface warship industry sees pivotal growth from fleet replacement and technology advancements, driving demand in leading countries and markets. Report forecasts market trends until 2032.
news.summary: In Dublin, the report "Surface Warships - Market and Technology Forecast to 2032" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The surface warship sector is currently crucial, influenced by the requirements for fleet replacement/modernization, new maritime threats, and technological progress. Key advancements in surface ship technology fall into Operational Design and Material Innovations, and Software-Driven Enhancements categories. This market is projected to grow significantly, with an expected rise in demand for modern warships driven by evolving operational needs and emerging threats.

news.headline: Approximately 75% of VASPs in the EU face compliance challenges with MiCA regulations, leading to potential shutdowns.
news.summary: The Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) requires all virtual asset service providers (VASPs) registered in the EU before 2025 to comply with its requirements this year. However, only around 25% of VASPs are predicted to be able to meet the new regulations, similar to the situation in Estonia where 1,900 companies lost their VASP registrations due to new requirements. MiCA imposes complex processes like AML/KYC, data protection, and cyber resilience, leading to high costs of compliance ranging from 30,000 to 80,000 euros. This poses a significant challenge for small crypto startups and businesses, especially in countries like Poland and the Czech Republic where it was previously easier to obtain VASP registrations. As a result, many small businesses and startups may not be able to comply with MiCA, potentially leading to a significant decrease in VASPs operating in the EU.

PPG wins third consecutive Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award for business strategies aligned with employees.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh today, PPG (NYSE: PPG) disclosed their reception of the Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award (GEWA) for the third year in a row. This prestigious award is given to companies that excel in aligning their business objectives with employee well-being. PPG was commended by Gallup for its creative approaches in engaging and nurturing its workforce, thus establishing higher standards for workplace quality. Brenda Br, a representative from PPG, emphasized the crucial role of employees in fulfilling the company's mission of safeguarding and enhancing the world's aesthetics.

news.headline: Century Communities shares 10 flex room ideas for homebuyers. A top U.S. homebuilder, they were recognized by Newsweek.
news.summary: In Greenwood Village, Colorado on March 13, 2025, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a prominent national homebuilder, known for its excellence in online home sales and recognition on America's Most Trustworthy Companies and World's Most Trustworthy Companies lists by Newsweek, shared valuable tips.

news.headline: DailyDelta™ launches 0DTE Options ETFs, offering unique leverage with returns exceeding 2x or 3x. Led by Kelly Intelligence and Tidal.
news.summary: A newly launched suite of exchange-traded funds (ETFs) called DailyDelta™ is unique in that it offers the only ETFs that hold Zero-Days-to-Expiry (0DTE) options. These ETFs aim to provide unmatched daily market leverage. With a focus on delivering magnified returns of over 2x or 3x, DailyDelta™ ETFs are designed to track the market closely. Featuring Zero-Days-to-Expiry options, these ETFs offer investors the opportunity to capitalize on rapid changes in the market and potentially achieve amplified gains.

news.headline: Washington Speakers Bureau to represent cybersecurity expert Jen Easterly, renowned in cybersecurity, national security, and organizational resilience.
news.summary: In a recent update on March 13, 2025, the Washington Speakers Bureau (WSB) revealed their new exclusive partnership with Jen Easterly, a prominent figure recognized globally for her expertise in cybersecurity, national security, and organizational resilience. Easterly will now be represented solely by WSB, providing invaluable knowledge in these critical areas.

news.headline: CESI opens new solar cell line in Milan, launches CESI Space division to lead in space energy sector.
news.summary: In Milan on March 13, 2025, CESI demonstrated its commitment to advancing in the space energy field by unveiling a state-of-the-art production line at its Milan laboratories. This move solidifies CESI's position as a key player in the sector. Concurrently, the company introduced CESI Space, a specialized business division focused solely on space-related endeavors. This strategic expansion underscores CESI's dedication to innovation and growth in the space industry, marking a significant milestone for the Group.

news.headline: JND Legal Administration appoints Nicole Christ as SVP of Operations, an experienced leader.
news.summary: Nicole Christ has been appointed as the Senior Vice President of Operations at JND Legal Administration (JND), the top legal administration services provider in the United States. With a background in government and consumer redress, Christ will now be a key member of JND's senior management team. The appointment was announced on March 13, 2025, in Seattle.

news.headline: NRMP to reveal 2025 Main Residency Match results next week, anxiously awaited by medical education community.
news.summary: The National Resident Matching Program® (NRMP®) is preparing to commence Match Week 2025, a significant event for the medical education field. Residency candidates from various locations are eagerly anticipating Monday, March 17, when they will discover if they have secured a placement. This process is crucial for these individuals as they hope to find positions in their desired medical specialties.

National Grid Renewables commits $500,000 to charity via Apple River Solar Project, benefiting Amery and Clayton schools.
news.summary: The Amery and Clayton school districts are set to receive charitable funds from National Grid Renewables. The company announced on March 13, 2025, their commitment to provide $500,000 in charitable funding from the Apple River Solar Project based in Polk.

news.headline: US to sell $48 bln 52-week bills on March 18th, to settle on March 20th.
Silversea announces 132-day World Cruise 2028, visiting 58 destinations across 5 continents with new experiences.
news.summary: Silversea's World Cruise in 2028 on Silver Shadow will span across 5 continents and include visits to 58 destinations. The cruise will offer unique shore experiences and overland tours for passengers to enjoy. The luxury travel brand, Silversea, is renowned for providing exceptional travel experiences.

news.headline: Aragon Research names top ICC providers for SMBs in 2025 report, emphasizing Generative AI impact.

The report sheds light on the swift evolution of the market, propelled by Generative AI and digital labor technologies.

news.headline: Inventor from Waukegan, Ill., creates accessory to prevent fluids in baby's ear; product aimed at bottle-fed babies.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Waukegan, Illinois, shared the inspiration behind their creation of THE FLUID EAR product. This innovation aims to prevent bottle milk or other fluids from entering a baby's ear canals while drinking in positions like lying on their back, side, or in a reclined posture. The product is designed to enhance safety and comfort for infants during feeding, showcasing a practical solution to a common concern.

news.headline: Survalent to exhibit Synergy and Themis at DISTRIBUTECH 2025, aiding utilities with AI-driven innovation for DSO future.
news.summary: Cutting-edge solutions facilitate the smooth integration of distributed energy resources (DERs), precise data analytics and forecasting at high speed, and instant decision-making – vital needs of utilities evolving into distribution system operators. The developments are anticipated to greatly aid utilities as they maneuver through this transition.

news.headline: 3 energy stocks lead gains in tough market week for S&P 500: Super Micro Computer, Axon climb.
news.summary: Amid a challenging week for the market, three energy stocks have surged ahead on the S&P 500 index. Leading the gains are Super Micro Computer and Axon, among others. These energy stocks have stood out amidst the overall downturn in the market, showcasing their resilience and potential for growth. This development underscores the importance of monitoring fluctuations in specific sectors, as they can provide valuable insights for investors navigating volatile market conditions.

news.headline: Alibaba introduces new AI assistant Quark amidst fierce competition in Chinese AI market from Baidu and DeepSeek.
news.summary: A latest version of Alibaba's AI assistant, named Quark, has been introduced by the company to enter the competitive market against rivals like Baidu and DeepSeek. This move comes amidst the escalating competition in the Chinese AI industry.

news.headline: Bespin Global appoints David Ting as CTO to drive AI strategy, with 30+ years of tech leadership.
news.summary: In New York on March 13, 2025, Bespin Global, a top cloud and AI solutions provider, has named David Ting as their new Chief Technology Officer (CTO). Bringing more than 30 years of experience in technology leadership, AI innovation, and cybersecurity, Ting's appointment marks a significant step for the company.

news.headline: Yellowstone Bourbon launches Small Batch 107, a 6-year-aged bourbon with bold 107 proof for intense and balanced flavor.

This six-year-aged bourbon boasts a bold 107 proof, ensuring a harmonious blend of intense flavors. The release was announced in St. Louis on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: ACORD Solutions Group launches ADEPT Regional Hub in Bermuda, offering one million free digital messaging transactions.
news.summary: Today, in Hamilton, Bermuda and New York, ACORD Solutions Group unveiled the ADEPT Bermuda Regional Hub, marking a significant move in the global insurance sector. The hub will offer next-generation digital solutions and serve as a key player in data exchange. This initiative is set to revolutionize the industry, with ACORD leading the charge towards innovation and efficiency.
